description: NZ curriculum-aligned HTML5 canvas math game for ages 6-12. Ship dodges/catches falling meteors labelled with math answers. Correct answer recharges shield; wrong depletes it.

gameLoop.summary: 3-lane canvas game. One question shown at top. 3 meteors fall (one per lane) labelled with answer choices. Player taps/swipes a lane to move ship. Ship collides with the meteor in its lane when meteors reach ship level — correct = shield/score up, wrong = shield down.

fileStructure.note: The game is split across multiple files for GitHub Pages hosting. index.html is a shell only — no inline CSS or JS.
fileStructure.index.html: HTML shell: all screen divs (Phase 1-2). Links to css/style.css and js/game.js. No inline styles or scripts.
fileStructure.css/style.css: All CSS for all screens and components (Phase 1-3). Includes .screen, .btn, .card, .upgrade-card, .ship-card, .mission-row, .tip-card, .landing-nav, .xp-bar, .strand-row etc.
fileStructure.js/game.js: All JavaScript: constants, config, question generators, game loop, rendering, screen management, Phase 2 upgrades/missions/cosmetics. No import/export — runs in browser global scope.
fileStructure.data/*.json: Source-of-truth spec files. NOT loaded at runtime — data is inlined as constants in js/game.js.

screenFlow: landing → age-select → mode-select → game → (gameover | results) → landing
landing → missions → age-select → game (mission mode) → (gameover | results) → landing

phases.title: Core Playable Game
features: HTML shell: landing, age-select, mode-select, game-canvas, gameover, results screens
Canvas game engine: requestAnimationFrame loop, scaling, touch/keyboard input
3-lane ship movement with smooth lerp animation
Meteor wave spawning and falling with configurable speed
Collision detection: meteor reaches ship Y → evaluate ship lane
Question types: addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, algebra (missing number), number patterns, geometry (perimeter/area), fractions of amounts
Distractor generation: near-miss, common misconceptions, unique guarantees
Shield system: drain per second, recharge on correct, penalty on wrong
Scoring: score, XP, coins with combo multiplier
Combo + Fever mode (triggered at 5/10/15 combo)
Adaptive difficulty: adjusts up/down based on last-10-answer accuracy
Game modes: Quick Run (2.5 min, hasFailure), Zen (no drain, no fail)
Age bands: age6_7 (diff 1-3), age8_9 (diff 2-5), age10_12 (diff 3-7) with strand weights
Particle burst on correct/wrong
Screen-shake on wrong answer
Fever rainbow border + golden glow overlay
LocalStorage persistence: best score, total correct answered
Responsive canvas scaling (mobile portrait and desktop)
Star-field scrolling background

phases.title: Missions, Upgrades & Cosmetics
features: Mission select screen: 13 missions from MISSIONS constant, progress shown, goal tracking
Mission mode gameplay: goal-specific win condition (streak, correct count, fever, reach level, shield above, type correct, coins in run)
Upgrades screen: purchase with coins, 3 categories (survival, speed_score, math_helper), tabs
Apply upgrade effects in-game: shield_max, shield_recharge, drain_multiplier, xp_multiplier, bonus_coins, second_chance, eliminate_one, slow_on_streak
Cosmetics screen: 8 ships with unlock conditions (level, correct_total, streak, fever_total) — color-coded canvas rendering
Teaching tip overlay shown after every wrong answer (TIPS constant with strategy + example)
New question types: money (NZD change/totals), time (clock arithmetic), statistics (mean/mode), probability (P fraction), decimal
Per-question timing bonus XP: +5 XP if answered within 3 seconds
Persistent game progress: level, xp, coins, upgrades, cosmetics, completedMissions, strandStats, feverTotal in localStorage mmsr_stats
XP level-up animation drawn on canvas HUD (gs.levelUpAnim countdown)
Extended landing screen: Missions, Shop, Ships, Stats nav buttons
Stats screen: best score, total correct, coins, level XP bar, strand accuracy breakdown
Ship cosmetic colors applied to canvas rendering (shipColor/trailColor from selected ship)

phases.title: Audio, Polish & Advanced Features
features: Web Audio API: procedural SFX for correct (chime), wrong (thud), fever (swell), level-up (fanfare), game-over (descend)
Background ambient space music (oscillator-based procedural with LFO modulation, starts on game start, fades out on game end)
Audio mute toggle button (#audio-toggle, fixed top-right, muted state persisted in localStorage)
Enhanced particle system: trail particles behind ship every 40ms (fever=3x density), explosion rings on correct/wrong (expand and fade), star burst on fever trigger (24 hue-rotated particles + ring)
Advanced number patterns: square numbers (n², (n+1)², ...) added to genPattern for difficulty ≥ 5 alongside doubling sequences (50/50 random)

Daily challenge mode: deterministic LCG seed from YYYYMMDD date, 50 pre-generated questions per day per age band, result saved to localStorage (mmsr_daily_YYYYMMDD), status shown on landing and mode screen
Improved meteor visuals: glow pulse intensity and radius based on distance to ship (proximity-based alpha + lineWidth animation)

phases.title: Full Content & NZ Curriculum Coverage
plannedFeatures: Place value highlight upgrade visual effect (colour-code tens/ones on meteor text)
Eliminate-one upgrade: dims eliminated meteor with X overlay
Accessibility: high contrast mode, reduced motion
i18n hook for Te Reo Māori labels (ka rawe, tino pai)

dataFiles.data/config.json: Master config reference: canvas size, shield values, scoring, combo, adaptive, modes, ageBands, audio, particles. NOTE: runtime uses CFG constant inlined in js/game.js.
dataFiles.data/questions.json: Question type specs: rangeA/B per difficulty, templates, distractor rules
dataFiles.data/upgrades.json: 11 upgrades across 3 categories with effect specs. NOTE: runtime uses UPGRADES array inlined in js/game.js.
dataFiles.data/cosmetics.json: 8 ships, 5 trails, 5 pets, 5 stickers with unlock conditions. NOTE: runtime uses SHIPS array inlined in js/game.js.
dataFiles.data/missions.json: 13 missions with goals, rewards, and unlock ship references. NOTE: runtime uses MISSIONS array inlined in js/game.js.
dataFiles.data/teaching.json: Teaching tips per question type with strategy, visual type, step-by-step examples. NOTE: runtime uses TIPS constant inlined in js/game.js.

techStack.runtime: Pure HTML5 + Vanilla JS + Canvas 2D — no build tools, no frameworks
techStack.hosting: GitHub Pages (static), served as separate HTML/CSS/JS files
techStack.dataLoading: All game data (config, questions, upgrades, ships, missions, tips) inlined as constants in js/game.js. No fetch() calls. Works as file:// and GitHub Pages.
techStack.persistence: localStorage key: mmsr_stats (bestScore, totalCorrect, level, xp, coins, upgrades, unlockedShips, selectedShip, completedMissions, strandStats, feverTotal)

codingNotes.canvasCoords: Origin top-left. SHIP_Y = GH-110. Meteors start at y = -(MR*2), fall downward.
codingNotes.laneAssignment: lane 0 = left (x 0-160), lane 1 = center (x 160-320), lane 2 = right (x 320-480). laneCenter(n) = n*160 + 80.
codingNotes.collisionModel: Each meteor checked individually. When m.y >= SHIP_Y - SHIP_H/2 - MR AND m.lane === gs.shipLane → hit.
codingNotes.questionFlow: spawnQuestion() → generateQuestion() → spawnMeteors(). On any hit (correct or wrong) gs.questionAnswered=true. When all meteors exit canvas → spawnQuestion() again.
codingNotes.adaptiveDifficulty: Uses last-10 answer window. Accuracy >0.85 → difficulty++. Accuracy <0.65 → difficulty--. Clamped to ageBand diffMax.
codingNotes.feverMode: Triggered when combo hits thresholds [5,10,15]. Lasts 8s. Doubles coins, halves shield drain, golden ship, rainbow border.
codingNotes.rendering: drawBg() → drawLanes() → drawMeteors() → drawShip() → drawParts() → drawHUD() → drawFeverBorder()
codingNotes.upgradeEffects: Upgrades applied at runtime: getShieldMax(), getDrainMult(), upgLevel(id). Second chance stored in gs.secondChanceLeft. Slow time in gs.slowTimeActive + gs.slowTimeTimer.
codingNotes.missionFlow: missions screen → startMission(id) → age-select (if ageBandId not set) → startGame(). Mission mode sets gs.modeId='mission', gs.missionId. updateMission() called on correct/wrong/fever/level events.
codingNotes.agentSessionNote: Parts 1 and 2 completed in separate sessions (Feb/Mar 2026). Phase 2 completed in third session (Mar 6 2026). Phase 3 completed in fourth session (Mar 6 2026). Future agents start from Phase 4.
